/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test_flow_aggregator.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/test_flow_aggregator.dir/tests/test_flow_aggregator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_flow_aggregator.dir/src/FlowAggregator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_flow_aggregator.dir/src/JsonSerializer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_flow_aggregator.dir/src/FeatureEmitter.cpp.o -o test_flow_aggregator
